# GLAMO NEPAL

> Premium beauty, skincare, makeup and personal care curated from Naya Baneshwor, Kathmandu, Nepal.

## What we do

GLAMO Nepal is an online beauty and cosmetics store serving customers across Nepal. We curate authentic skincare, makeup, haircare, and personal care products from international and Nepali brands, with delivery across Nepal and Cash on Delivery support.

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://glamonepal.com/
- Shop all products: https://glamonepal.com/shop
- Collections: https://glamonepal.com/collections
- Skincare routines: https://glamonepal.com/routines
- Brand directory: https://glamonepal.com/brands
- Blog: https://glamonepal.com/blog
- FAQ: https://glamonepal.com/faq
- About: https://glamonepal.com/about
- Contact: https://glamonepal.com/contact

## Payment methods

- Khalti (digital wallet)
- eSewa (digital wallet)
- Cash on Delivery (COD)
- Cards (via payment gateway)

## Shipping

- Delivery across Nepal
- Kathmandu Valley: 1-2 business days
- Outside Valley: 3-5 business days
- Free shipping on orders over NPR 2,000

## Contact

- Phone: +977 9818212188

- Facebook: /glamonepal
- Location: Naya Baneshwor, Mantra In & Out Square, Kathmandu, Nepal
